diy-hub-v1.current_task_title: Stage 11: Real fix for Wemos D1 Mini + similar bugs
diy-hub-v1.approval_phrase: Triggered by NOFI direct bug report, urgent fix
stage_11_features: _all_tokens_match: requires ALL query tokens in title (was: at least one)
REMOVED trusted-source bypass in clean_candidates (was letting Adafruit DVI Sock pass for Wemos query)
NEW PHOTO_SUFFIXES: 26 suffixes like Front/Back/Top/Pinout/Schematic -> rejected (Wikimedia photos, not products)
NEW PROJECT_MARKERS: 36 markers like weatherstation/luftdata/iotproject/esphome/circuitpython -> rejected (projects using the chip)
Project markers use NORMALIZED title (dashes collapsed) so 'Wemos-D1-Mini-BME280-Weather-Station' is caught
NEW VARIANT_SUFFIXES: 25 variants like pro/plus/lite/micro/v2/s3/esp32 -> -0.25 score penalty (demoted, not rejected)
Wikidata bonus +0.20 -> +0.25 (so wikidata candidates pass threshold)
Added wikidata.org/entity/ to trusted source patterns (was missing /entity/ format)
